message:
perf: eliminate unnecessary heap allocations across providers, session store, and diff generation

Systematic allocation reduction pass targeting hot paths:

- extensions.rs: replace iterator collect+join with direct String push loop
  for relative_posix(); cache compiled regexes via OnceLock in
  redact_command_for_logging()
- models.rs: avoid Vec<String> allocation in ModelRegistry::find() for the
  common non-OpenRouter path by using direct eq_ignore_ascii_case comparison
- providers/mod.rs: replace 8 unnecessary .clone() calls with borrows (&)
  in build_js_model() JSON serialization
- providers/azure.rs, openai.rs: replace .collect::<Vec<_>>().join("") with
  .collect::<String>() for zero-separator joins
- providers/gemini.rs, openai.rs, openai_responses.rs: pre-allocate vectors
  with Vec::with_capacity() based on known message counts
- session_store_v2.rs: use Cow<'static, str> for constant schema/state
  fields instead of String; use serde_json::to_writer for direct file I/O
  instead of to_vec + write_all; remove redundant flush() calls on
  scoped file handles
- tools.rs: rewrite generate_diff_string() to use single String buffer with
  write!() instead of Vec<String> + join; use memchr for fast newline
  counting; use ilog10 for digit width instead of to_string().len();
  replace Vec cloning with slice arithmetic for context windows
- tests: update test construction to reflect unboxed AssistantMessageEvent
  and .into() for session_id (likely Arc<str> or similar)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -430,17 +430,17 @@ impl ExtensionStreamSimpleProvider {
 
     fn build_js_model(model: &crate::provider::Model) -> Value {
         serde_json::json!({
-            "id": model.id.clone(),
-            "name": model.name.clone(),
-            "api": model.api.clone(),
-            "provider": model.provider.clone(),
-            "baseUrl": model.base_url.clone(),
+            "id": &model.id,
+            "name": &model.name,
+            "api": &model.api,
+            "provider": &model.provider,
+            "baseUrl": &model.base_url,
             "reasoning": model.reasoning,
-            "input": model.input.clone(),
-            "cost": model.cost.clone(),
+            "input": &model.input,
+            "cost": &model.cost,
             "contextWindow": model.context_window,
             "maxTokens": model.max_tokens,
-            "headers": model.headers.clone(),
+            "headers": &model.headers,
         })
     }
